name: CIDOC CRM
notes: Core ontology. All models in this repository are aligned to this version.

name: CRMdig
notes: Extension for digital provenance and technical metadata. Adjusted for compatibility with CIDOC CRM 7.1.3.

name: CRMsci
notes: Extension for scientific observation and measurement. Adjusted for compatibility with CIDOC CRM 7.1.3.

name: ResearchSpace
notes: Platform-specific classes and properties used within the ResearchSpace deployment at the National Gallery. CRM-aligned alternatives are planned for future inclusion alongside these terms.
